summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Fesa Global website rebrand. All major functionality working correctly including rotating globe, navigation, tab switching, carousel, accordion, contact form, and mobile menu.
passed_tests: Hero section with rotating wireframe globe loads correctly
Complete Fesa Global branding verified (no RJ Associates references)
All navigation links (Home, Services, Regions, About, Testimonials) present and functional
Get Started buttons successfully scroll to contact section
WhatsApp button has correct wa.me link
Europe/Americas tab switching in Regions section works properly
Contact form fields (name, email, phone, message) all functional
Mobile menu toggle opens and closes properly with all navigation items
Dark theme with black background and white/grey text implemented
Page title correctly shows 'Fesa Global | International Healthcare & Construction Recruitment'
Logo displays 'Fesa Global' branding with 'F' icon
